chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KABACTII cFlNO.o- 6s27t2015 Mr. Justice Faisal Arab, CJ. Mr. Justice Muhammad lqbal Kalhoro Petitioners Respondent Date of hearing and Order. 22.10.2015 Muhammad lqbal Kalhoro, J: The case of petitioner is that his nomination papers for the seat of General Member of Town Committee Garho, Ward No.2 were accepted by the respondent No.3/Returning Officer Ghorabari & Keti Bunder at Baghan District Thattarbut in appeal preferred by the respondent No 4 namely Wazir Ali his nomination papers were rejected on the plea that he had concealed the facts regarding his assets in the nomination papers. Learned counsel for petitioner has stated that as the agricultural land to which reference has been made in the impugned order, original belongs to father of the petitioner rrt-- and he has inherited a meager share of 0.10 % paisa, about which ". he had no actual and previous informations, therefore, due to bonafide mistake he could not show said land in his nomination papers. As the petitioner now has disclosed factum of his such property which according to him due to bona fide mistake, he cold not mention in his Election Form, we see no excuse to still deny him from his right of contesting electio The petition in the circumstance is allowed and impugned ord is set aside CE JUOGE DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURES OF JUDGE(S) Muhammad Siddiqui through Mr. Faisal Ahmed Memon advocate Mr. Saifullah AAG alongwith Mr. Abdullah Hanirah Law Officer ECP ORDER
